'''Aida''' was the sparsely-populated primary [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Aida system/Legends|Aida system]], near [[Lomabu III]] on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. Under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the world would be overseen by [[Governor/Legends|Imperial Governor]] [[Io Desnand]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. When the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chenlambec]] arrived on Aida requesting help from his fellow Wookiees to trap the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]], they quickly assisted in leading him to the [[Lomabu system/Legends|Lomabu system]].
